# Card text fonts — attribution

MTG-flavored typography for card pages, vendored as web fonts (woff2) from the
[Fontsource](https://fontsource.org) distributions. Both are licensed under the
**SIL Open Font License 1.1** (see the `LICENSE-*.txt` files alongside).

- **Cinzel** — used for card titles (`font-title`). The Cinzel Project Authors
  (https://github.com/NDISCOVER/Cinzel).
- **EB Garamond** — used for type lines and oracle text (`font-card`). The EB Garamond Project
  Authors (https://github.com/octaviopardo/EBGaramond12).

These are open-licensed fonts, **not** the proprietary Beleren/MPlantin typefaces used on physical
cards; they're a free, redistributable approximation of that look. scryme is unofficial Fan Content
and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Wizards of the Coast.
